description: Stocks with high volatility (>60%) requiring strict risk management

market_conditions.interpretation: High valuation but neutral sentiment - cautious approach needed

stocks.expected_reason: Extremely high volatility (73%) - high risk, requires tight stop loss
Moderate-high volatility with neutral RSI, wait for clearer signal

strategy_validation.outcome: Position sizing and stop loss recommendations prevented excessive losses

strategy_validation.expected_behavior: Reduce position size and tighten stop losses for volatile stocks
strategy_validation.actual_behavior: Correctly identified high volatility, provided appropriate warnings
strategy_validation.key_insight: High volatility stocks can still be profitable with proper risk management

lessons_learned: Volatility alone doesn't mean avoid - means manage risk
Position sizing should be inversely proportional to volatility
Stop loss percentage should match volatility level
Beta > 2.0 requires extra caution in uncertain markets
COIN 73% volatility with proper sizing still yielded +20.8%
